simulator.tooltips.LSB: LSB ToolTip : The least significant bit or the low-order bit.
simulator.tooltips.VariableLed: Variable Led ToolTip: Variable LED inputs an 8 bit value and glows with a proportional intensity.
simulator.tooltips.Text: Text ToolTip: Use this to document your circuit.
simulator.tooltips.Input: Input ToolTip: Toggle the individual bits by clicking on them.
simulator.tooltips.verilogPower: verilogPower ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.Buffer: Buffer ToolTip : Isolate the input from the output.
simulator.tooltips.NorGate: Nor Gate ToolTip : Combination of OR gate and NOT gate.
simulator.tooltips.Rectangle: Rectangle ToolTip : Used to Box the Circuit or area you want to highlight.
simulator.tooltips.Button: Button ToolTip: High(1) when pressed and Low(0) when released.
simulator.tooltips.SixteenSegDisplay: Sixteen Display ToolTip: Consists of 16+1 bit inputs.
simulator.tooltips.PriorityEncoder: Priority Encoder ToolTip : Compresses binary inputs into a smaller number of outputs.
simulator.tooltips.Counter: Counter: a binary counter from zero to a given maximum value
simulator.tooltips.Output: Output ToolTip: Simple output element showing output in binary.
simulator.tooltips.DigitalLed: Digital Led ToolTip: Digital LED glows high when input is High(1).
simulator.tooltips.verilogDivider: verilogDivider ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.MSB: MSB ToolTip : The most significant bit or the high-order bit.
simulator.tooltips.SevenSegDisplay: Seven Display ToolTip: Consists of 7+1 single bit inputs.
simulator.tooltips.Adder: Adder ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.OrGate: Or Gate ToolTip : Implements logical disjunction
simulator.tooltips.NotGate: Not Gate ToolTip : Inverts the input digital signal.
simulator.tooltips.verilogMultiplier: verilogMultiplier ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.ConstantVal: Constant ToolTip: Bits are fixed. Double click element to change the bits.
simulator.tooltips.NandGate: Nand Gate ToolTip : Combination of AND and NOT gates
simulator.tooltips.RGBLed: RGB Led ToolTip: RGB Led inputs 8 bit values for the colors RED, GREEN and BLUE.
simulator.tooltips.ImageAnnotation: Image ToolTip: Embed an image in the circuit for annotation
simulator.tooltips.BitSelector: BitSelector ToolTip : Divides input bits into several equal-sized groups.
simulator.tooltips.XnorGate: Xnor Gate ToolTip : Logical complement of the XOR gate
simulator.tooltips.TriState: TriState ToolTip : Effectively removes the output from the circuit.
simulator.tooltips.Multiplexer: Multiplexer ToolTip : Multiple inputs and a single line output.
simulator.tooltips.Stepper: Stepper ToolTip: Increase/Decrease value by selecting the stepper and using +/- keys.
simulator.tooltips.XorGate: Xor Gate ToolTip : Implements an exclusive OR.
simulator.tooltips.Decoder: Decoder ToolTip : Converts coded inputs into coded outputs.
simulator.tooltips.Flag: FLag ToolTip: Use this for debugging and plotting.
simulator.tooltips.Demultiplexer: DeMultiplexer ToolTip : Multiple outputs and a single line input.
simulator.tooltips.verilogShiftLeft: verilogShiftLeft ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.HexDisplay: Hex Display ToolTip: Inputs a 4 Bit Hex number and displays it.
simulator.tooltips.SquareRGBLed: Square RGB Led ToolTip: RGB Led inputs 8 bit values for the colors RED, GREEN and BLUE.
simulator.tooltips.ControlledInverter: Controlled Inverter ToolTip : Controlled buffer and NOT gate.
simulator.tooltips.AndGate: And Gate ToolTip : Implements logical conjunction
simulator.tooltips.TwoComplement: Two's Complement Tooltip : Calculates the two's complement
simulator.tooltips.verilogShiftRight: verilogShiftRight ToolTip : Performs addition of numbers.
simulator.tooltips.Splitter: Splitter ToolTip: Split multiBit Input into smaller bitwidths or vice versa.
simulator.tooltips.SRflipFlop: SR FlipFlop ToolTip : SR FlipFlop Selected.
simulator.tooltips.JKflipFlop: JK FlipFlop ToolTip : gated SR flip-flop with the addition of a clock input.
simulator.tooltips.TflipFlop: T FlipFlop ToolTip :  Changes state / Toggles whenever the clock input is strobed.
simulator.tooltips.Dlatch: D Latch : Single input Flip flop or D FlipFlop
simulator.tooltips.DflipFlop: D FlipFlop ToolTip : Introduces delay in timing circuit.
